input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.5.2
            TITLE: there must be no connection between the chassis of the vehicle (or any other conductive

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.5.2: There must be no connection between the Chassis of the vehicle (or any other conductive
EV.6.5.2 There must be no connection between the Chassis of the vehicle (or any other conductive 
surface that might be inadvertently touched by a person), and any part of any Tractive System 
circuits.

final_answer: There must be no connection between the Chassis of the vehicle (or any other conductive surface that might be inadvertently touched by a person), and any part of any Tractive System circuits.
